text.title: Learning Speed as Competitive Moat Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns observed across deployments. Each pairs symptom + root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Team can't articulate why they bet on feature X; defends bet emotionally.
antipattern.root-cause: No belief register; assumptions never captured.
antipattern.fix: Maintain templates/belief_update.py register: assumption, confidence, source, last-updated.

antipattern.symptom: Roadmap reflects founder narrative; competitor moves and market data ignored.
antipattern.fix: Require ≥1 outside-view input per strategic decision (competitor move, market data, customer signal).

antipattern.symptom: Bet drags on 18 months with no clear evidence threshold to stop.
antipattern.root-cause: Kill criteria never pre-registered; sunk cost dominates.
antipattern.fix: Every bet records signal + threshold + observation window for kill at start.

antipattern.symptom: Beliefs only re-scored at annual planning; competitor cycles 4x.
antipattern.root-cause: No weekly cadence; learning lives in the annual offsite only.
antipattern.fix: Hold weekly 30-min belief-update ritual; missed weeks count as moat erosion.
